That’s according to Africa Foot, who cover Hull City and Millwall interest when sharing the latest on the defender’s situation at Nottingham Forest. arts.sum: On Friday, we covered claims from Brazil that Wolverhampton Wanderers manager Vitor Pereira has included Palmeiras’ Richard Rios in his transfer wish list. RTI Esporte state the 24-year-old is not negotiating with Wolves, but they have held talks for him. arts.ttl: Analysis: Can Ait-Nouri step up for Wolves in Cunha's absence?
arts.sum: That impressive run has taken them out of the relegation zone, but with talisman Matheus Cunha suspended for Monday night’s match at home to Nottingham Forest, the new head coach at Molineux must find a way to win without his best player. If Pereira wants to push Ait-Nouri on and deploy him in the Cunha role, his starting XI could look something like this, with Rodrigo Gomes coming in at left wing-back.
